evals.name: hook-system
evals.prompt: Write a literate guide for the hook system in capacitor
evals.expected_output: A narrative markdown document covering the hud-hook Rust crate, explaining what it does, why it exists, and how it captures Claude Code events — written in Knuth's literate programming style with numbered sections and cross-references

evals.name: session-tracking
evals.prompt: Tell the story of how capacitor tracks and restores Claude Code sessions
evals.expected_output: A narrative markdown document tracing the cross-cutting flow from hook event capture through the Rust runtime core to the Swift UI, explaining the design decisions along the way

evals.name: runtime-core
evals.prompt: I need to understand the capacitor runtime core — can you write me a narrative walkthrough of how it works?
evals.expected_output: A narrative markdown document covering the capacitor-core Rust crate's architecture, state management, storage, and how it serves data to the Swift app
